current_lead_thread.note: Successor lead accepted the prepared transition after verifying origin/main, task graph, goal-mode state, model routing state, thread registry, Human Gate state, and handoff evidence. Actual model and effort are recorded only because request metadata exposed them.

retired_lead_threads.note: Historical outgoing thread id was unavailable in the prepared handoff and is intentionally left null.
